title: ProductOS V10 Product One-Pager
value_proposition: ProductOS gives Product Managers god-like superpowers — autonomously generating world-class strategy, prototypes, PRDs, and marketing content from messy research inputs. PMs cut manual work by 70% while producing McKinsey-quality outputs.
customer_quote: "ProductOS saved me 3 hours this week on status updates alone. The strategy deck first draft was 70% there — I spent 2 hours refining instead of 10 hours building from scratch." — Sarah Chen, Senior PM

feature_highlights.title: Autonomous PESTLE Analysis
feature_highlights.description: 6-factor environmental analysis with 3-horizon projections. McKinsey-grade. Evidence-backed.

feature_highlights.title: AI Prototype Generation
feature_highlights.description: 3 interactive HTML variants with WCAG accessibility. Compare side-by-side. Pick the best.

feature_highlights.title: Decision Intelligence
feature_highlights.description: Trade-off analysis, decision trees, sensitivity, premortems. Make better decisions, faster.

feature_highlights.title: Living System
feature_highlights.description: Artifacts auto-refresh when data changes. Never ship from stale research again.

feature_highlights.title: Marketing Content Pack
feature_highlights.description: Messaging, battle cards, blog briefs, emails — all auto-generated from product truth.

competitive_differentiators: Only PM tool with PESTLE environmental analysis and decision intelligence
3-variant AI prototype generation — no competitor offers interactive HTML prototypes
Living system that auto-refreshes artifacts — competitors generate static outputs
pricing_summary: Starting at $39/seat/month for core discovery. Professional tier at $79/seat/month with autonomous mode. Enterprise tier with SSO + dedicated support at $149/seat/month. 14-day free trial — no credit card required.
cta: Start your free trial at productos.dev/trial
footer: ProductOS Inc. | SOC2 Type II | GDPR Compliant | productos.dev
